title: Operational Bulletins 2009 - Canada.ca
content:
## Operational Bulletins 2009
In exceptional circumstances, operational bulletins may also be issued for one-time-only instructions or to provide urgent instructions to staff for a brief period while the relevant operational chapters are being updated.
- OB 170 – December 30, 2009 Assessing Official Language Requirements for Temporary Foreign Workers
- OB 171 – December 19, 2009 Electronic In Canada Applications (e-Application)
- OB 168 – December 18, 2009 Enhanced visa services offered in the Czech Republic
- OB 172 – December 18, 2009 Expiry of Sri Lanka Initiative
- OB 161 – November 5, 2009 (Expired) Monitoring terms and conditions on entrepreneurs selected under the Immigration Act , 1976 and issued a visa after the coming into force of the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act
- OB 163 – October 30, 2009 Privacy of Host’s Information
- OB 162 – October 30, 2009 Shaking Hands at Citizenship Ceremonies – Temporary Measure
- OB 158 – October 1, 2009 (Expired) Guidelines for Priority Processing – Response to Typhoon Ketsana affecting the Philippines
- OB 148 – September 16, 2009 (Expired) Priority Processing – Response to the Situation in Iran
- OB 108 – September 16, 2009 Hinton v. Her Majesty the Queen – Notice to Class Members
- OB 156 – September 15, 2009 (Expired) Role and Responsibilities of CIC in the Context of the Enhanced Driver’s Licence ( EDL ) and Enhanced Identification Card ( EIC ) Programs
- OB 153 – September 1, 2009 (Expired) Credit Card Payment Option for Applications for Permanent Residence in the Federal Skilled Worker Class
- OB 152 – March 10, 2010 (Expired) Limited validity period for labour market opinions
- OB 147 – August 17, 2009 Work Permit Policies Relating to the 2010 Winter Olympic/Paralympic Games
- OB 146 – August 14, 2009 (Expired) Alberta Pilot Project for Spouses and Common-Law Partners of Long-Haul Truck Drivers
- OB 145 – August 14, 2009 (Expired) Changes to R204 Exemption Code T10 and New Provincial Authority
- OB 141 – August 6, 2009 Changes in photo specifications for the Permanent Resident Card
- OB 143 – August 4, 2009 (Expired) Procedures for Receiving Canadian Experience Class Applications at Visa Offices
- OB 124 – July 31, 2009 (Expired) Implementation of the Canada-Peru Free Trade Agreement
- OB 142 – July 30, 2009 Transit Without Visa Program
- OB 63B – July 29, 2009 Assessing Excessive Demand on Social Services
- OB 135 – July 24, 2009 Streamlining the Refugee Intake Process
- OB 136 – July 23, 2009 (Expired) Procedures for Humanitarian and Compassionate Applications as a Result of Lifting the Temporary Suspension of Removals on Burundi, Liberia and Rwanda
- OB 134 – July 17, 2009 (Expired) First Generation Limit and Citizenship by Descent – Clarification for Port of Entry Officers
- OB 133 – July 17, 2009 (Expired) Foreign Media Crews
- OB 123 – June 25, 2009 (Expired) Pilot Project for Working-Age Dependent Children of Workers Destined to Ontario
- OB 122 – June 25, 2009 (Expired) Pilot Project for Working-Age Dependent Children of Workers Destined to Alberta
- OB 129 – July 13, 2009 Czech Republic – New Temporary Resident Visa Requirements
- OB 128 – July 13, 2009 Mexico – New Temporary Resident Visa Requirements
- OB 126 – July 9, 2009 Processing spouse or common-law partner in Canada class applications when humanitarian and compassionate consideration is requested
- OB 131 – July 6, 2009 (Expired) Application of Dual Intent
- OB 130 – July 2, 2009 (Expired) Restoration Guidelines
- OB 120 – June 15, 2009 (Expired) Federal Skilled Worker ( FSW ) Applications – Procedures for Visa Offices
- OB 116 – June 4, 2009 Real Time Identification ( RTID ) Project / Digital Fingerprinting
- OB 119 – June 3, 2009 (Expired) Sri Lanka Initiative – Applications for Family Class Members and Dependants of in-Canada Permanent Residence Applicants Affected by the Current Humanitarian Situation
- OB 114 – May 19, 2009 (Expired) Updated Schedule 4 and New Schedule 4A for Provincial Nominees
- OB 113 – May 12, 2009 (Expired) Pilot project for occupations requiring lower levels of formal training – Extension of work permits from within Canada at the end of 24 months
- OB 111 – April 27, 2009 Open Work Permits and Provincial Health Insurance in Ontario and Quebec
- OB 106 – March 30, 2009 (Expired) Visa Exemption Requirements – Croatia – Instructions for Missions
- OB 101 – February 27, 2009 (Expired) C-50 Frequently Asked Questions ( FAQ s)
- OB 102 – February 26, 2009 (Expired) Implementation of Bill C-37, an Act to Amend the Citizenship Act
- OB 100 – February 17, 2009 Departmental Roll-out of the E-application for the Issuance of Study Permits and Extensions in Canada
- OB 096 – February 3, 2009 National Roll-out of the Electronic Notification System ( ENS ) for the Off-Campus Work Permit Program ( OCWPP )
- OB 097 – January 30, 2009 Temporary Foreign Worker Units ( TFWUs ) Support
- OB 094 – January 20, 2009 (Expired) Canadian English Language Proficiency Index Program
- OB 092 – January 15, 2009 This operational bulletin has expired. Please refer to chapter OP 11 for current information.

## All operational bulletins (by year)
